## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Component

- [ ] Bridge (HTTP server / session collection)
- [ ] Serial Bridge (USB transport binary)
- [ ] Firmware (ESP32 display)
- [ ] Documentation

## Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature address? Why do you need it? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How would you like this to work? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Hardware Requirements (Firmware Features)

<!-- Does this require specific hardware? Additional pins, sensors, display modules? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution better? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, references to similar implementations, related issues. -->
